meaning: 布拉戈维申斯克[苏联远东区城市](中国传统称海兰泡)
examples: Russian man died after burying himself alive in a friend's garden in the Far Eastern city of Blagoveshchensk in an endurance test that went wrong, AFP reported.
Yevgeny Makhno, a judge in the far-eastern town of Blagoveshchensk, tendered his resignation earlier this week after video clips of him were uploaded onto YouTube.
